dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, the uprising has begun, but the {quest_threat} hit back hard. Your efforts to {quest_action} drew their attention.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_ally} reports that {enemy_type} are sweeping the area near the {quest_focus}. They are hunting for the {quest_stakes}. We need you to intercept them {location_hint} before they find our people.
dialogueChunks.outro: The revolution lives or dies on what happens next. We need you out there.

playerResponses.text: I will draw their fire. Keep the people safe.
This is getting dangerous. But I will not abandon the cause.
I did my part. The rest is up to you.

dialogueChunks.intro: The crackdown came, {player_name}. After you helped us {quest_action}, the {quest_threat} retaliated against the {quest_stakes} directly.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_ally} is rallying supporters, but we need weapons and resources. The {enemy_type} seized a cache near the {quest_focus}: it is {location_hint}. Recover {quest_item} from them and break their hold.
dialogueChunks.outro: Every blow against them strengthens our resolve. We cannot stop now.

playerResponses.text: Recover the cache, weaken their grip. On it.
Raiding a seized cache? That is a bold move.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, a spy within our ranks nearly undid everything. Since you helped {quest_action}, the {quest_threat} learned the location of the {quest_focus}.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: We had to move fast. {quest_ally} relocated the {quest_stakes}, but {enemy_type} are converging on the area {location_hint}. We need someone to lead them away and deal with the patrols.
dialogueChunks.outro: Betrayal stings, but the cause is bigger than one traitor. Help us survive this.

playerResponses.text: A traitor complicates things, but does not end them. I will handle the patrols.
You have a leak and hostile patrols. This is a mess.
If your own people are turning, this cause is lost.
